makc        2011-04-24 20:28:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/stardict3   Makefile distinfo pkg-message pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    textproc/stardict3/files patch-src::conf.cpp src_conf.h 
  Log:
  Update to 3.0.2
  Take maintainership
  
  Port changes:
  rename GNOMEUI option to more common GNOME and turn it off
  mark run conflict with stardict2
  remove support for 6.x
  update pkg-message
  sort plist
  
  PR:             ports/156228
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
